prompt: 把 work-devops-cursor-rollout 从归档恢复，新的截止日期设到2026-12-31

assertions.name: frontmatter_archive_removed
assertions.description: archive-date 和 archive-reason 字段已移除

assertions.name: wikilinks_restored
assertions.description: 全库 wiki-link 从 4.Archives/work-devops-cursor-rollout 更新回 1.Projects/work-devops-cursor-rollout

assertions.name: zero_stale_refs
assertions.description: 更新后无残留的归档路径引用
